name: Bounty Hunter
description: A green low shrub that is fluffy like a pom-pom. Its ability to adapt to various environments allows it to survive in even the harshest conditions.\nIt is said that among these plants, there is a one in 100,000 chance that the color of their branches and leaves will change over time influenced by their environment, much like a bounty hunter who adapts their survival methods to the shifting situation.
